message:
fix: slim down mission feedback UX, add dismiss, remove duplicate terminate (#8621)

- Redesign mission feedback from bulky card to slim inline bar
- Add X dismiss button to both feedback and save-resolution prompts
- Remove duplicate inline terminate button (header already has one)
- Make ksc_mission_rated GA4 event bypass opt-out (like NPS)
- Feedback resurfaces per mission but can be dismissed per session

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
